/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:27:in `5030682`).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:28:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:29:## Pending tag — v0.34.0
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:30:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:31:Per `ROADMAP.md`, IV.4 closed at `7cb5634` (2026-04-20) but the
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:32:**v0.34.0 git tag has not been issued** because B1 (ZMQ command
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:33:channel idle-death) still reproduces. Once B1 is mitigated via the
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:34:IV.7 ipc:// path or another route, v0.34.0 can ship.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:35:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:36:Confirmed since IV.4 close:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:37:- Q4 equivalence check PASS (Codex gpt-5.5/high) on the b2b4fb5 R1
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:38:  repair ([[40 Decisions/2026-04-24-d1-d4a-execution]] 22:16
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:39:  addendum). Branch `feat/b2b4fb5-repair` merged via `89b4db1`.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:40:- IV.6 ephemeral-REQ + watchdog landed (`be51a24`); does NOT close
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:41:  B1 but stays in master as defense-in-depth.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:42:- Thyracont `validate_checksum` wired through (`aabd75f`).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:43:- `xml_safe` sanitizer for python-docx (`74dbbc7`) — fixes auto-report
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:44:  failure with real Keithley `\x00` resource strings.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:45:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:46:## Release discipline
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:47:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:48:Per `CLAUDE.md` "Дисциплина релизов": each new tag updates
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:49:`CHANGELOG.md` (Added / Changed / Fixed / Infrastructure / Known
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:50:Issues / Test baseline / Tags / Selected commits) and only updates
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:51:`README.md` / `CLAUDE.md` if user-facing facts changed. No re-tagging
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:52:to fold post-tag docs updates; no auto-update hooks.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:53:

/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/60 Roadmap/Versions.md:58:  mitigation that doesn't close B1

/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:1:---
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:2:source: src/cryodaq/drivers/instruments/lakeshore_218s.py; drivers/transport/gpib.py; CLAUDE.md "Драйверы"; config/instruments.yaml
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:3:last_synced: 2026-04-26
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:4:status: synthesized
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:5:---
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:6:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:7:# LakeShore 218S
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:8:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:9:8-channel cryogenic temperature monitor. Read-only with respect to
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:10:the system being measured (no source authority).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:11:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:12:## Interface and channels
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:13:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:14:- **Transport:** GPIB (`drivers/transport/gpib.py` via PyVISA).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:15:- **Default poll interval:** 2.0 s (`config/instruments.yaml`).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:16:- **Daisy-chain:** three controllers in production
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:17:  (`LS218_1` GPIB::12, `LS218_2` GPIB::14, `LS218_3` GPIB::16).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:18:  Combined channel count: 24, named Т1..Т24 (Cyrillic Т prefix).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:19:- **Driver class:** `LakeShore218S` — extends `InstrumentDriver` ABC.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:20:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:21:Per-channel labels are loaded from
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:22:`config/instruments.yaml::instruments[*].channels` and used as the
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:23:canonical channel names everywhere downstream.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:24:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:25:## Reading kinds
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:26:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:27:| Method | Command | Output |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:28:|---|---|---|
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:29:| `read_channels()` | `KRDG?` (or `KRDG? <ch>` per-channel) | calibrated kelvin reading from the LakeShore controller (uses on-device calibration table) |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:30:| `read_srdg_channels()` | `SRDG?` | sensor raw value (Ohm / V depending on input type), pre-calibration |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:31:| `read_calibration_pair()` | `KRDG? <ch>` + `SRDG? <ch>` | one (kelvin, raw) pair for calibration v2 acquisition |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:32:| `read_status()` | `RDGST?` | per-channel status bitmask (overrange / underrange / sensor-error) |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:33:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:34:KRDG and SRDG are surfaced as separate channels in the broker so
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:35:calibration acquisition (`CalibrationAcquisitionService`) can pair
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:36:them. See [[10 Subsystems/Calibration v2]].
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:37:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:38:## IDN validation with retry-after-clear (Phase 2c Codex F.1)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:39:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:40:`connect()` validates `*IDN?` against expected vendor before assuming
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:41:control. Earlier behavior (warn-and-proceed) allowed silent
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:42:mis-routing — `KRDG?` would return numbers from the wrong instrument
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:43:without anyone noticing. Current behavior: retry once after `*CLS`,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:44:then fail hard if IDN still doesn't match.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:45:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:46:## Per-channel runtime calibration (v2)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:47:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:48:`LakeShore218S` ships per-channel runtime routing for calibration v2:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:49:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:50:- Global mode `on/off`: enable / disable per-channel calibration
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:51:  application across all channels.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:52:- Per-channel policy `inherit | off | on`: overrides the global mode.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:53:- Conservative fallback: if curve / assignment / SRDG missing OR
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:54:  computation throws, fall back to KRDG (controller calibrated reading)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:55:  and log the reason once per `(channel, reason)` to avoid log spam
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:56:  (`_runtime_warning_cache`).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:57:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:58:`_use_per_channel_krdg` and `_use_per_channel_srdg` are tri-state
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:59:flags driven by `_krdg0_fail_count` and `_srdg0_fail_count`: if the
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:60:batch `KRDG?`/`SRDG?` form fails N times, the driver switches to
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:61:per-channel form for `_krdg_batch_retry_interval_s` (default 60 s),
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:62:then attempts batch form again.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:63:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:64:## Mock mode
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:65:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:66:`mock=True` produces realistic signals via `_mock_sensor_unit(t)`
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:67:(`temp` → ohms approximation `1600/(T+15) + 0.08`) over a tuple of
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:68:realistic base temperatures (4.2 K, 4.8 K, 77 K, 77.5 K, 4.5 K, 4.1 K,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:69:3.9 K, 300 K). Useful for engine smoke tests and GUI development.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:70:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:71:## Notable quirks
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:72:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:73:- **GPIB bus serialization.** Multiple LakeShores on the same bus
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:74:  (`GPIB0::*`) cannot be polled in parallel — NI GPIB-USB-HS does
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:75:  not tolerate concurrent access even with `asyncio.Lock` +
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:76:  `run_in_executor`. `Scheduler` groups same-bus drivers into one
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:77:  sequential task. See `core/scheduler.py:67`.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:78:- **`OVERRANGE`/`UNDERRANGE` valid as ±inf.** `RDGST?` returns
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:79:  status codes; the driver maps them to `ChannelStatus` enum.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:80:  OVERRANGE/UNDERRANGE persist as `±inf` in REAL SQLite columns;
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:81:  SENSOR_ERROR/TIMEOUT (NaN) are filtered before write (Phase 2d
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:82:  invariant 10).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:83:- **Cyrillic Т prefix homoglyph hazard.** Per-channel labels use
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:84:  Cyrillic Т (U+0422). LLMs occasionally produce Latin "T" in
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:85:  generated config; tests can pass while the channel never matches
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:86:  any rule. See [[30 Investigations/Cyrillic homoglyph in alarm config]].
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:87:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:88:## See also
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:89:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:90:- [[20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B]]
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:91:- [[20 Drivers/Thyracont VSP63D]]
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:92:- [[10 Subsystems/Calibration v2]]
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:93:- [[10 Subsystems/Safety FSM]] — Т1..Т8 are critical channels for
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S.md:94:  rate-limit and overheat interlock

/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/build log.md:116:## Phase 5 — Update protocol (01:17 MSK, 2026-04-27)

/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:7:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:8:# ADR-2026-04-24 — Overnight swarm launch
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:9:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:10:## Context
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:11:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:12:Executing `CC_PROMPT_OVERNIGHT_SWARM_2026-04-24.md` — ten scoped
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:13:consultation jobs distributed to two independent verifier models:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:14:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:15:- **Codex gpt-5.5 / reasoning high** × 5 tasks (codex-01..05).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:16:- **Gemini 2.5-pro** × 5 tasks (gemini-01..05).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:17:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:18:All artifacts collected under
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:19:`artifacts/consultations/2026-04-24-overnight/` (briefs, responses,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:20:per-stream syntheses, master summary).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:21:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:22:## Decision
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:23:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:24:### CLI-direct dispatch instead of slash commands
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:25:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:26:Plan referenced `/codex:rescue --background ...`; reality: the
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:27:slash-command form is not a shell invocation. Adapted to direct
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:28:`codex exec` and `gemini` CLI calls, wrapped in detached
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:29:`nohup bash -c '...' </dev/null >/dev/null 2>&1 &` subshells.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:30:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:31:Codex flags settled on:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:32:- `-m gpt-5.5`, `-c model_reasoning_effort="high"`
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:33:- `-s read-only`, `--skip-git-repo-check`
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:34:- stdin-fed prompt (`< BRIEF.prompt.md`), stdout `> RESPONSE.response.md 2>&1`
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:35:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:36:Gemini flags settled on (after parallel-dispatch failure, see below):
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:37:- `-m gemini-2.5-pro`, `--yolo` (so Gemini can read repo files
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:38:  + run `git show` — default approval mode blocks shell)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:39:- `-o text`, `-p "$(cat BRIEF.prompt.md)"`
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:40:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:41:### Model-string probe before batch
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:42:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:43:3-token round-trip probe with `gpt-5.5` and `gemini-2.5-pro` returned
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:44:"probe ok". §3.7 fallback to gpt-5.4 did not fire.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:45:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:46:### Gemini parallel → serial chain (rate-limit + tool-access fix)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:47:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:48:First parallel dispatch hit two issues within ~20 s:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:49:1. **Per-minute rate ceiling** — 5× parallel gemini-2.5-pro calls
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:50:   exhausted capacity ("Your quota will reset after 0s").
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:51:2. **Tool access** — without `--yolo`, Gemini default approval mode
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:52:   refused `run_shell_command`; briefs require Gemini to read multiple
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:53:   files + `git show`.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:54:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:55:Adaptation: kill swarm wrapper PIDs (carefully avoiding pre-existing
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:56:unrelated gemini processes), zero out partial-error response files,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:57:relaunch Gemini as a single serial chain with 30 s gaps and `--yolo`,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:58:single tracking PID `50252`. Codex stayed parallel.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:59:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:60:### Outcome rules
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:61:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:62:- Per skill §4.2 slop check (< 500 words, no file:line refs, evasive)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:63:  → retry once per §7.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:64:- Phase 6–9 morning retrieval: per-stream synthesis → 4 files under
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:65:  `STREAM_SYNTHESES/`, `MASTER_SUMMARY.md`, single commit.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:66:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:67:## Consequences
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:68:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:69:- This ledger records a working CLI-direct dispatch adaptation.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:70:  Codex stayed parallel; Gemini was relaunched as a serial chain
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:71:  with 30 s gaps and `--yolo`, expected runtime ~30–60 min for 5 jobs.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:72:- `--yolo` is required for Gemini whenever the brief asks the model
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:73:  to read repo files or run shell tooling.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:74:- Morning retrieval / synthesis / commit (Phase 6–9 of the launch
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:75:  spec) remained open at session end.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:76:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:77:## Status
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:78:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:79:Accepted. Morning retrieval and synthesis remain open in this source
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:80:ledger; the digest of the operational pattern that emerged from this
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:81:and similar runs lives in [[50 Workflow/Overnight swarm pattern]].
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:82:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-overnight-swarm-launch.md:83:## See also

/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/templates/Subsystem template.md:20:been load-bearing during real incidents.>
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/templates/Subsystem template.md:21:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/templates/Subsystem template.md:22:## Edges
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/templates/Subsystem template.md:23:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/templates/Subsystem template.md:24:<What this subsystem is NOT responsible for; where the boundary is.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/templates/Subsystem template.md:25:Useful when investigating a bug to know what NOT to read.>

/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:1:---
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:2:source: docs/decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:3:adr_id: ADR-2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:4:date: 2026-04-24
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:5:status: accepted
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:6:---
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:7:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:8:# ADR-2026-04-24 — b2b4fb5 hypothesis investigation (H3 CONFIRMED)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:9:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:10:## Context
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:11:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:12:Commit `b2b4fb5` (2026-04-23 15:10, "harden B1 capture bridge startup
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:13:validation") added a synchronous probe `_validate_bridge_startup()`
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:14:to `tools/diag_zmq_b1_capture.py`. The 2026-04-23 ~16:30 IV.7 runtime
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:15:test failed with cmd #0 abort and the failure was originally
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:16:attributed to the IV.7 `ipc://` transport itself.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:17:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:18:Hypothesis H3: `b2b4fb5`'s startup probe is incompatible with `ipc://`
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:19:because the engine's REP socket isn't ready when the probe fires,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:20:causing a `zmq.Again` to surface as a hard failure — and IV.7's
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:21:runtime failure was therefore a misattribution of a hardening race,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:22:not a transport defect.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:23:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:24:## Decision
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:25:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:26:H3 CONFIRMED via empirical test on `experiment/iv7-ipc-transport`
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:27:worktree:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:28:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:29:| Scenario | Hardening | Transport | Engine age at cmd #1 | Result |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:30:|---|---|---|---|---|
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:31:| IV.7 2026-04-23 failure | present | ipc:// | < 1 s (fresh) | abort at cmd #0 — "Engine не отвечает" |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:32:| Retest with `git revert b2b4fb5` (bridge_extended) | reverted | ipc:// | 4 s | 44/44 OK then B1 idle-death at cmd #45 (uptime 79.1 s) |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:33:| Retest (b1_capture, fresh engine) | reverted | ipc:// | 4 s | **20/20 OK** |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:34:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:35:The probe's literal output (`{"ok": false, "error": "Engine не отвечает (Resource temporarily unavailable)"}`) matched `/tmp/diag_iv7_capture.log` from the original failure — same code path, same error message.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:36:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:37:What this proves:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:38:1. `ipc://` transport itself is viable; the IV.7 narrative was a misattribution.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:39:2. The b2b4fb5 probe has a startup race against ipc:// bind timing
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:40:   (instantaneous on tcp:// loopback; non-instantaneous on Unix-socket bind).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:41:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:42:What this does NOT prove:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:43:3. **B1 idle-death is unrelated to b2b4fb5.** B1 reproduces at ~80 s
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:44:   uptime regardless of hardening presence. IV.7 did not fix B1. H4
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:45:   (pyzmq/asyncio integration) and H5 (engine REP state machine)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:46:   remain viable for B1 root cause.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:47:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:48:Repair options proposed:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:49:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:50:- **R1** — fix probe to be startup-race-tolerant (bounded backoff retry).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:51:- **R2** — move readiness into `bridge.start()` itself.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:52:- **R3** — revert b2b4fb5 entirely.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:53:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:54:Architect chose **R1**. Implementation landed on `feat/b2b4fb5-repair`
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:55:branch (`c3f4f86`), merged to master via `89b4db1`. Q4 adversarial
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:56:equivalence check (Codex gpt-5.5/high) — PASS, zero findings, R1 and
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:57:b2b4fb5 predicates behave identically across 7 edge-case inputs.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:58:See [[40 Decisions/2026-04-24-d1-d4a-execution]] for execution detail.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:59:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:60:## Consequences
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:61:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:62:- IV.7 unblocks transport-level testing. B1 still OPEN; root cause
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:63:  to be found at H4/H5 layer or elsewhere
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:64:  ([[30 Investigations/B1 ZMQ idle-death]]).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:65:- A new pattern is codified: synchronous health probes at engine /
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:66:  subprocess startup must accommodate non-instantaneous bind
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:67:  semantics. `ipc://` Unix-socket bind in particular needs a
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:68:  retry-with-backoff.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:69:- Skill loaded mid-session via manual `Read` (the registry snapshot
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:70:  at session start did not include `multi-model-consultation`,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:71:  committed mid-session via `9a1a100`). Surfaced as an
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:72:  ORCHESTRATION.md edit item: skill registry refresh requires
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:73:  harness restart.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:74:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:75:## Status
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:76:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:77:Accepted; R1 merged to master; D1 loop formally closed via Q4
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:78:adversarial check.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:79:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:80:## See also
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:81:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:82:- [[30 Investigations/B1 ZMQ idle-death]]
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:83:- [[30 Investigations/b2b4fb5 hardening race]]
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:84:- [[40 Decisions/2026-04-24-d1-d4a-execution]]
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md:85:- [[50 Workflow/Multi-model consultation]]
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:1:---
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:2:source: CC_PROMPT_VAULT_BUILD_2026-04-26.md §5; this build's reflection
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:3:last_synced: 2026-04-26
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:4:status: protocol — read on every session that may touch the vault
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:5:---
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:6:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:7:# Update protocol
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:8:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:9:When CC should update this vault from CryoDAQ session work, and
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:10:when CC should leave the vault alone.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:11:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:12:## Direction of trust
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:13:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:14:```text
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:15:~/Projects/cryodaq/  ← authoritative
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:16:       │
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:17:       ▼ (sync via this protocol)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:18:~/Vault/CryoDAQ/     ← derived integration layer
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:19:```
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:20:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:21:If the vault and the repo conflict, the repo wins. The vault carries
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:22:`source:` and `last_synced:` frontmatter on every note so staleness
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:23:is visible.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:24:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:25:## Triggers — when CC SHOULD update
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:26:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:27:CC should propose a vault update when one of these happens during a
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:28:session and the operator agrees:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:29:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:30:- **`CLAUDE.md` modified** in a way that changes architecture,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:31:  invariants, or module index → re-read affected pages under
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:32:  `00 Overview/` or `10 Subsystems/` and reconcile. Always update
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:33:  `last_synced:` after a real reconciliation; do not bump the date
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:34:  on a no-op pass.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:35:- **New file in `docs/decisions/`** → mirror as a new ADR under
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:36:  `40 Decisions/<filename without .md>.md`. Frontmatter `source:`
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:37:  cites the original file and same date. Do NOT invent ADR-NNN
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:38:  numbers — those are reserved for synthesized rationales without a
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:39:  committed source decision file.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:40:- **Investigation closes** (a `30 Investigations/` candidate gains a
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:41:  decision file, or the bug is empirically resolved) → create or
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:42:  update the corresponding `30 Investigations/` page; add a
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:43:  `status:` line saying *closed* / *open* / *partially confirmed*.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:44:  Reflect new hypothesis-tree state.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:45:- **`ROADMAP.md` F-table status change** (✅ → 🔧, 🔧 → ⬜, etc.) →
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:46:  update `60 Roadmap/F-table backlog.md` row + frontmatter
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:47:  `last_synced:`. Do not deep-rewrite ROADMAP detail — link to the
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:48:  repo doc as source.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:49:- **New skill in `.claude/skills/`** → digest into `50 Workflow/`.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:50:  One workflow note per skill, digest format (mission / when to use /
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:51:  when not to / version notes / response gotchas). Cross-link with
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:52:  `[[50 Workflow/ORCHESTRATION contract]]` if the skill operates
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:53:  under that protocol.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:54:- **New tag** (`v0.34.0`+) shipped → add row to
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:55:  `60 Roadmap/Versions.md`. If the release closes a long-standing
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:56:  bug, also flip the corresponding `30 Investigations/` page status.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:57:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:58:## Triggers — when CC should NOT update
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:59:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:60:- **Every commit.** Too noisy; vault is curated, not mechanical.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:61:- **Personal session ledgers** (`docs/decisions/<date>-session.md`).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:62:  Those live in the repo and are the authoritative chronology. Vault
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:63:  doesn't mirror them; the *outcome* of the session may surface
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:64:  via one of the triggers above.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:65:- **`CHANGELOG.md` "Unreleased" updates that aren't yet released.**
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:66:  Wait for the tag. Premature mirror creates churn.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:67:- **Reorganized but unchanged repo content.** A move from
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:68:  `docs/foo.md` to `docs/runbooks/foo.md` doesn't change what the
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:69:  vault knows; just update the `source:` line on next reconciliation.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:70:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:71:## Staleness rule
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:72:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:73:Every note's `last_synced:` should be within **30 days** of the
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:74:relevant repo change. Older = stale flag in `[[_meta/source map]]`.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:75:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:76:The audit pattern that catches this: at the start of any vault-touch
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:77:session, regenerate the source map (`artifacts/vault-build/build_source_map.py`)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:78:and read it. Notes older than 30 days should be reconciled before
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:79:new work starts, or explicitly noted as "deferred".
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:80:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:81:## Process for a small reconciliation
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:82:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:83:1. Identify the trigger (which file in repo changed, what changed).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:84:2. Read the relevant vault note(s) AND the changed source file(s).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:85:3. Edit the note inline; bump `last_synced:` to today's date; update
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:86:   `source:` if new files joined the source list.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:87:4. If the change is structurally significant (new section,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:88:   dropped section, new wikilink), regenerate
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:89:   `[[_meta/source map]]`.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:90:5. Append a one-line entry to `[[_meta/build log]]` under the
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:91:   running session's heading.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:92:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:93:## Process for a larger build (whole-vault rebuild)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:94:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:95:The 2026-04-26 build is the reference example. The CC_PROMPT for it
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:96:lives at `~/Projects/cryodaq/CC_PROMPT_VAULT_BUILD_2026-04-26.md`.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:97:Future whole-vault rebuilds should follow the same shape:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:98:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:99:- Pre-flight (verifier availability, vault state, MCP)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:100:- Skeleton + reference seed (mechanical)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:101:- Synthesis (judgment)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:102:- Cross-link + source map
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:103:- This protocol page
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:104:- Codex + Gemini parallel audit gates between phases
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:105:- Integration loop until quiescent
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:106:- Polish + morning handoff
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:107:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:108:## Audit gate cadence
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:109:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:110:When CC reconciles vault from repo state, an audit gate is OK to
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:111:skip if the change is small (< 3 notes touched, < 50 lines diff).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:112:For batch reconciliations (multiple notes, structural changes),
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:113:dispatch a Codex literal + Gemini structural pass per
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:114:[[50 Workflow/Multi-model consultation]]. Don't run audits on
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:115:every micro-edit.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:116:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:117:## Conflicts and overrides
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:118:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:119:When verifier feedback contradicts repo source, repo wins. Examples
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:120:recorded in [[_meta/build log]]:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:121:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:122:- Gemini suggested "MainWindow retired in Phase I.1" — `CLAUDE.md`
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:123:  says Phase II.13. CC overruled Gemini.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:124:- Gemini suggested rewriting "retroactive tagging v0.34.0..v0.38.0"
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:125:  as chronologically broken — source ledger uses this exact phrasing.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:126:  CC added a clarifier note instead.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:127:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:128:The pattern: if vault contradicts source, fix vault. If verifier
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:129:contradicts source, ledger the disagreement and keep source-aligned
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:130:text.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:131:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:132:## See also
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:133:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:134:- [[_meta/source map]] — current note inventory + last_synced ages
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:135:- [[_meta/glossary]] — terms used across notes
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:136:- [[_meta/build log]] — append-only chronology of vault edits
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:137:- [[50 Workflow/ORCHESTRATION contract]] §6 — repo-side artifact
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/_meta/update protocol.md:138:  discipline that bounds what the vault even sees
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:1:---
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:2:source: CLAUDE.md "Физическая установка"; config/instruments.yaml; PROJECT_STATUS.md
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:3:last_synced: 2026-04-26
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:4:status: synthesized
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:5:---
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:6:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:7:# Hardware setup
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:8:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:9:CryoDAQ runs against a single physical rig at the Millimetron / АКЦ
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:10:ФИАН cryogenic lab. Three instrument families on three transports.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:11:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:12:## Instruments
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:13:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:14:| Instrument | Interface | Channels | Driver |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:15:|---|---|---|---|
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:16:| LakeShore 218S × 3 (`LS218_1` `GPIB0::12::INSTR`, `LS218_2` `GPIB0::14::INSTR`, `LS218_3` `GPIB0::16::INSTR`) | GPIB | 24 temperature (Т1..Т24) | [[20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S]] |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:17:| Keithley 2604B (`Keithley_1` `USB0::0x05E6::0x2604::04052028::INSTR`) | USB-TMC | `smua` + `smub` | [[20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B]] |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:18:| Thyracont VSP63D type [^vsp206] (`VSP63D_1` COM3 @ 9600 baud) | RS-232 (serial) | 1 pressure | [[20 Drivers/Thyracont VSP63D]] |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:19:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:20:[^vsp206]: Production lab PC actually has VSP206 hardware (different checksum formula); driver still loaded as `thyracont_vsp63d` type with `validate_checksum: false` per-machine override. See [[20 Drivers/Thyracont VSP63D]] and [[10 Subsystems/Alarm engine v2]].
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:21:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:22:Configuration lives in `config/instruments.yaml`; per-machine overrides
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:23:in `config/instruments.local.yaml` (gitignored).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:24:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:25:## Channel layout (LakeShore daisy-chain)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:26:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:27:Three controllers, eight channels each, grouped semantically:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:28:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:29:- **LS218_1** (GPIB::12) — `Т1 Криостат верх`, `Т2 Криостат низ`, `Т3 Радиатор 1`,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:30:  `Т4 Радиатор 2`, `Т5 Экран 77К`, `Т6 Экран 4К`, `Т7 Детектор`,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:31:  `Т8 Калибровка`
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:32:- **LS218_2** (GPIB::14) — `Т9 Компрессор вход`, `Т10 Компрессор выход`,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:33:  `Т11 Теплообменник 1`, `Т12 Теплообменник 2`, `Т13 Труба подачи`,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:34:  `Т14 Труба возврата`, `Т15 Вакуумный кожух`, `Т16 Фланец`
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:35:- **LS218_3** (GPIB::16) — `Т17 Зеркало 1`, `Т18 Зеркало 2`, `Т19 Подвес`,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:36:  `Т20 Рама`, `Т21..24 Резерв 1..4`
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:37:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:38:The «Т» prefix is **Cyrillic Т (U+0422)**, not Latin T. This homoglyph
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:39:caused a real config-evaluation bug; see [[30 Investigations/Cyrillic homoglyph in alarm config]].
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:40:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:41:## Per-machine field state (Ubuntu lab PC, 2026-04-20)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:42:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:43:- `Т4 Радиатор 2` is **physically disconnected** — open-circuit reads
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:44:  ~380 K. `interlocks.yaml::overheat_cryostat` regex was tightened
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:45:  from `Т[1-8] .*` to `Т(1|2|3|5|6|7|8) .*` to exclude it without
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:46:  losing coverage on Т1..Т8.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:47:- Thyracont hardware on this PC is actually **VSP206**, not VSP63D —
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:48:  uses a different checksum formula. `instruments.local.yaml` carries
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:49:  `validate_checksum: false` (per-machine override; `aabd75f` wired
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:50:  the YAML key through after it had been silently ignored).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:51:- `ModemManager` was disabled on the lab PC because it was transiently
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:52:  grabbing `/dev/ttyUSB0`.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:53:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:54:## Polling cadence
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:55:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:56:| Instrument | `poll_interval_s` |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:57:|---|---|
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:58:| LakeShore 218S × 3 | 2.0 |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:59:| Keithley 2604B | 1.0 |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:60:| Thyracont VSP63D | 2.0 |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:61:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:62:Polling is host-driven by [[10 Subsystems/Persistence-first|`Scheduler`]];
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:63:per-driver intervals are independent.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:64:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:65:## Out-of-band hardware
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:66:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:67:- **Keithley TSP supervisor** — `tsp/p_const.lua` is drafted but **not
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:68:  loaded** on the device. P=const feedback runs host-side in
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:69:  `keithley_2604b.py`. TSP supervisor planned for Phase 3 (requires
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:70:  hardware verification).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:71:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:72:## See also
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:73:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:74:- [[10 Subsystems/Safety FSM]] — uses temperature channels for rate
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:75:  limit / overheat interlock
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:76:- [[10 Subsystems/Calibration v2]] — calibration applies to LakeShore
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:77:  channels via per-channel policy
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/Hardware setup.md:78:- [[_meta/glossary]] — KRDG, SRDG, FSM definitions
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:1:---
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:2:source: CLAUDE.md; README.md; PROJECT_STATUS.md (2026-04-19); pyproject.toml; live wc/find counts (2026-04-26)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:3:last_synced: 2026-04-26
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:4:status: synthesized
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:5:---
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:6:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:7:# What is CryoDAQ
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:8:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:9:## What it is
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:10:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:11:CryoDAQ is the data acquisition and control stack for a cryogenic
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:12:laboratory at АКЦ ФИАН (the Millimetron telescope project). It
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:13:replaces the previous LabVIEW system with a Python 3.12+ codebase
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:14:built on `asyncio` and `PySide6`. Operator-facing language is Russian.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:15:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:16:## What it does
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:17:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:18:End-to-end laboratory workflow:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:19:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:20:- Continuous acquisition from three instrument families
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:21:  ([[00 Overview/Hardware setup]])
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:22:- Safety-critical source on/off authority via the
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:23:  [[10 Subsystems/Safety FSM]] (single-authority `SafetyManager`,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:24:  source OFF by default, fail-on-silence in RUNNING)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:25:- Persistence-first data path
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:26:  ([[10 Subsystems/Persistence-first]] — SQLite WAL commit before
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:27:  any subscriber sees a reading)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:28:- ZMQ-bridged operator GUI ([[10 Subsystems/ZMQ bridge]])
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:29:- Experiment lifecycle (templates, phases, finalize, archive,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:30:  auto-report)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:31:- Calibration v2 — continuous SRDG capture, three-mode UI, post-run
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:32:  Chebyshev fit ([[10 Subsystems/Calibration v2]])
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:33:- YAML-driven alarm engine v2 ([[10 Subsystems/Alarm engine v2]]),
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:34:  interlocks, housekeeping, telegram notifications
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:35:- Optional FastAPI web dashboard for monitoring
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:36:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:37:## Where it runs
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:38:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:39:Three runtime contours, all on a single lab PC (Linux Ubuntu 22.04
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:40:production / macOS dev):
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:41:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:42:1. `cryodaq-engine` — headless asyncio runtime: drivers, scheduler,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:43:   persistence, safety, alarms, plugins. Survives GUI restart.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:44:2. `cryodaq-gui` (or `cryodaq` Windows launcher) — desktop operator
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:45:   client. Connects to engine over ZMQ; can be killed/restarted
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:46:   without stopping data.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:47:3. `cryodaq.web.server:app` — optional FastAPI monitoring on `:8080`.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:48:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:49:ZeroMQ topology: PUB/SUB `:5555` for data (msgpack), REP/REQ `:5556`
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:50:for commands (JSON). The bridge subprocess isolates engine from GUI
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:51:crashes ([[10 Subsystems/ZMQ bridge]]).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:52:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:53:## Who maintains it
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:54:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:55:- **Architect:** Vladimir (also project owner; user of this vault).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:56:- **Implementation:** Claude Code as primary implementer with
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:57:  Codex / Gemini as adversarial reviewers
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:58:  ([[50 Workflow/Multi-model consultation]],
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/What is CryoDAQ.md:59:  [[50 Workflow/ORCHESTRATION contract]]).
