/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:1:---
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:2:source: src/cryodaq/drivers/instruments/keithley_2604b.py; drivers/transport/usbtmc.py; core/smu_channel.py; CLAUDE.md "Архитектура safety" + "Ключевые правила"; tsp/p_const.lua
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:3:last_synced: 2026-04-26
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:4:status: synthesized
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:5:---
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:6:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:7:# Keithley 2604B
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:8:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:9:Dual-SMU source-meter. Authority over electrical power source-on/off
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:10:delegated through `SafetyManager`; the driver itself does not decide
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:11:when to source.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:12:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:13:## Interface and channels
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:14:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:15:- **Transport:** USB-TMC (`drivers/transport/usbtmc.py` via PyVISA).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:16:- **Default poll interval:** 1.0 s.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:17:- **Channels:** `smua` and `smub` (dual-SMU). Each channel can be
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:18:  controlled independently; `emergency_off(channel=None)` covers
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:19:  both. There is **no single-name "combined" channel** —
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:20:  `core/smu_channel.py` types the channel as
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:21:  `Literal["smua", "smub"]`, and `normalize_smu_channel()` rejects
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:22:  anything else. The "smua + smub" wording in operator docs refers
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:23:  to running both channels concurrently with independent setpoints.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:24:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:25:Per-channel reading kinds: `voltage` (V), `current` (A),
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:26:`resistance` (Ohm), `power` (W). All four published per poll cycle
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:27:with channel naming `<instrument_id>/<smu>/<kind>`.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:28:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:29:## Host-side P=const regulation
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:30:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:31:```python
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:32:# tsp/p_const.lua — DRAFT, NOT LOADED on the device.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:33:# P=const feedback runs host-side in keithley_2604b.read_channels().
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:34:```
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:35:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:36:Per `CLAUDE.md` "Ключевые правила": no TSP scripts are uploaded to
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:37:the instrument; the VISA bus stays free for queries. The host loop:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:38:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:39:1. Read V and I from each active SMU.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:40:2. Compute `R = V/I` (skipped when `|I| < _I_MIN_A = 1e-7` to avoid
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:41:   noise-dominated divisions).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:42:3. Compute `target_v = sqrt(P_target × R)` for the requested
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:43:   `p_target`.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:44:4. Apply slew-rate limit `MAX_DELTA_V_PER_STEP = 0.5 V` per cycle so
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:45:   `target_v` cannot jump from 0 to `V_compliance` in one step on an
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:46:   abrupt resistance change (superconducting transition, wire break).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:47:5. Set new V; let next cycle re-measure.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:48:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:49:`_COMPLIANCE_NOTIFY_THRESHOLD = 10` consecutive compliance cycles
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:50:flips a per-channel `compliance_persistent()` flag and logs warnings;
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:51:it sets metadata on subsequent readings but does NOT directly notify
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:52:`SafetyManager` in the current code surface — the flag is a hook for
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:53:future safety integration. See `keithley_2604b.py:170` and `:350`.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:54:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:55:## Crash-recovery guard at connect
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:56:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:57:`Keithley2604B.connect()` forces `OUTPUT_OFF` on both SMU channels
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:58:before assuming control:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:59:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:60:> Best-effort: if force-OFF fails, logs CRITICAL and continues — not
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:61:> guaranteed.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:62:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:63:The intent: a previous engine crash that left the source ON cannot
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:64:silently keep being ON when the new engine attaches. See `CLAUDE.md`
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:65:safety section ("Crash-recovery guard").
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:66:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:67:## Disconnect calls emergency_off first
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:68:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:69:Per `CLAUDE.md` "Ключевые правила": `Keithley disconnect must call
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:70:emergency off first.` `disconnect()` runs `emergency_off()` on each
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:71:active SMU before closing transport, ensuring the operator's stop
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:72:button doesn't leave the source ON.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:73:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:74:## NI-VISA `\x00` quirk
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:75:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:76:VISA resource strings on Windows / NI-VISA contain `\x00` per spec
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:77:(e.g. `USB0::0x05E6::0x2604::04052028::INSTR`). python-docx rejects
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:78:those as XML 1.0-illegal control chars when embedded in auto-reports.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:79:Fixed `74dbbc7` (2026-04-20) via `src/cryodaq/utils/xml_safe.py`
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:80:sanitizer applied at all `add_paragraph()` / `cell.text` sites in
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:81:`reporting/sections.py`. Logger upgraded from `log.warning` to
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:82:`log.exception` so future report-gen failures carry tracebacks.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:83:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:84:## Mock mode
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:85:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:86:`_mock_r_of_t()` produces a realistic R(T) curve `R = R0 × (1 + α×T)`
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:87:with `_MOCK_R0=100`, `_MOCK_T0=300`, `_MOCK_ALPHA=0.0033`,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:88:`_MOCK_COOLING_RATE=0.1`, `_MOCK_SMUB_FACTOR=0.7`. Sufficient for
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:89:engine smoke and GUI exercise.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:90:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:91:## See also
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:92:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:93:- [[10 Subsystems/Safety FSM]] — single source-on/off authority
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:94:- [[20 Drivers/LakeShore 218S]]
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:95:- [[20 Drivers/Thyracont VSP63D]]
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/20 Drivers/Keithley 2604B.md:96:- `tsp/p_const.lua` — TSP supervisor draft (Phase 3, hardware-verify)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:1:---
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:2:source: CLAUDE.md "Источник истины по UI/визуальному дизайну"; PROJECT_STATUS.md "Phase I.1 + Design System v1.0.1"; PROJECT_STATUS.md "Host Integration Contract"; CHANGELOG.md "Phase III.A/B/C"
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:3:last_synced: 2026-04-26
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:4:status: synthesized — Phase 4 coverage-gap fix
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:5:---
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:6:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:7:# UI and design system
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:8:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:9:Operator-facing UI architecture, design system canon, and the
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:10:Host Integration Contract that ships overlays end-to-end.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:11:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:12:## Why this note exists
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:13:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:14:Gemini's Phase 2 audit flagged a coverage gap: the Phase I.1 shell
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:15:rebuild + Design System v1.0.1 + Host Integration Contract are a
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:16:significant fraction of recent architectural effort but had no
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:17:dedicated Overview note. This page closes that gap.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:18:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:19:## Design system canon
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:20:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:21:Source of truth for all operator-facing UI is `docs/design-system/`
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:22:(v1.0.1, 67 canonical .md files, 139 tokens). The folder structure:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:23:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:24:- `docs/design-system/README.md` — entry point, navigation
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:25:- `docs/design-system/MANIFEST.md` — full index + 65 encoded decisions
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:26:- `docs/design-system/rules/<category>-rules.md` — 79 enforcement rules
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:27:- `docs/design-system/components/<widget>.md` — generic primitives
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:28:- `docs/design-system/cryodaq-primitives/<widget>.md` — domain widgets
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:29:- `docs/design-system/patterns/<pattern>.md` — composition patterns
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:30:- `docs/design-system/accessibility/*.md` — WCAG 2.2 AA commitment
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:31:- `docs/design-system/governance/*.md` — evolution rules
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:32:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:33:Token semantics ship through `gui/theme.py` (139 foundation tokens).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:34:Hard rule: **all colors / sizes / radii / fonts come from `theme.py`.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:35:Hardcoded hex / px / font-size violates RULE-COLOR-010 / RULE-TYPO-007 /
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:36:RULE-SPACE-001.**
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:37:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:38:Deprecated tokens (STONE_*) are policy-tracked through
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:39:`docs/design-system/governance/deprecation-policy.md`. New code uses
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:40:canonical names (FOREGROUND, BACKGROUND, MUTED_FOREGROUND, etc.).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:41:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:42:## Phase I.1 — shell rebuild (v0.33.0)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:43:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:44:`MainWindowV2` replaced the legacy 10-tab `MainWindow` as primary
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:45:shell. Layout:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:46:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:47:- `TopWatchBar` — engine indicator, experiment status, 4 vitals + mode
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:48:  badge (Эксперимент / Отладка)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:49:- `ToolRail` — left-side icon navigation (9 slots, `Ctrl+[1-9]`
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:50:  transitional)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:51:- `OverlayContainer` — central content host with overlay primitives
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:52:- `BottomStatusBar` — safety state strip
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:53:- `DashboardView` — 5-zone ambient information radiator (sensor grid,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:54:  temp plot, pressure plot, phase widget, quick log) used as the
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:55:  default view
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:56:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:57:Canonical mnemonic shortcuts (per AD-002): `Ctrl+L/E/A/K/M/R/C/D` for
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:58:global navigation, plus `F5` and `Ctrl+Shift+X`. Sole owner of bindings
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:59:since `gui/main_window.py` was retired in Phase II.13. The
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:60:transitional `Ctrl+[1-9]` rail-slot numbering is scheduled to retire
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:61:with the legacy widget cleanup.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:62:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:63:Overlay primitives under
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:64:`gui/shell/overlays/_design_system/`: `ModalCard`, `BentoGrid`,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:65:`DrillDownBreadcrumb`. Showcase at `_showcase.py` for visual review.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:66:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:67:## Phase II — overlay rebuilds + Host Integration Contract
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:68:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:69:| Block | Status (2026-04-19) |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:70:|---|---|
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:71:| II.1 AnalyticsView | ✅ COMPLETE (`860ecf3`) |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:72:| II.2 ArchiveOverlay | ✅ COMPLETE (`e4a60f3`) |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:73:| II.3 OperatorLog | ✅ COMPLETE (`9676acc`) |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:74:| II.4 AlarmOverlay | ⚠️ PARTIAL (badge routing only) |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:75:| II.5 ConductivityOverlay | ⬜ NOT STARTED (next) |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:76:| II.6 KeithleyOverlay | ✅ COMPLETE (`96adf5a`) |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:77:| II.7 CalibrationOverlay | ⬜ NOT STARTED |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:78:| II.8 Instruments+SensorDiag | ⬜ NOT STARTED |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:79:| II.9 ExperimentOverlay v3 | ⚠️ PARTIAL (functional; visual pending) |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:80:| II.13 legacy cleanup | ✅ — DEPRECATED v1 widgets and `main_window.py` deleted |
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:81:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:82:### Host Integration Contract
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:83:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:84:Codified after the II.6 Keithley FAIL revealed a systemic risk:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:85:overlays with public push setters (`set_connected`,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:86:`set_current_experiment`, `set_safety_ready`, etc.) are useless if
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:87:`MainWindowV2` never calls them. Unit tests on the overlay alone pass
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:88:while production is broken.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:89:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:90:Contract — mandatory for every overlay with push setters:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:91:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:92:1. **`_tick_status()` mirror** for `set_connected(bool)`.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:93:2. **`_dispatch_reading()` state sinks** for stateful readings
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:94:   (safety state, experiment status, finalized events).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:95:3. **`_ensure_overlay()` replay** on lazy open — push cached state
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:96:   the moment the overlay is constructed, so the first paint is
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:97:   correct.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:98:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:99:Tests: overlay unit tests AND host integration tests
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:100:(`tests/gui/shell/test_main_window_v2_<block>_wiring.py`) that
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:101:exercise `MainWindowV2` entry points end-to-end (signal fire / cache
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:102:set / `_ensure_overlay` call) and assert overlay state.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:103:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:104:## Phase III — analytics + theming + accent decoupling
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:105:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:106:- **III.A — DS accent / status decoupling.** `STATUS_OK` (safety
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:107:  green) was rendering UI states (selected rows, active tabs, primary
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:108:  buttons, mode badge) and reading to operators as "this is healthy".
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:109:  Introduced `SELECTION_BG` and `FOCUS_RING` neutral interaction
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:110:  tokens; required by `_theme_loader.REQUIRED_TOKENS` across all 12
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:111:  bundled themes; 5 overlays + TopWatchBar mode badge migrated to
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:112:  `ACCENT + ON_ACCENT`. ADR 002 captures the rationale +
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:113:  hue-distance invariants.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:114:- **III.B — GlobalTimeWindow + shared PressurePlot + PredictionWidget.**
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:115:  `TimeWindow` enum promoted from dashboard-local to
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:116:  `cryodaq.gui.state.time_window` with `GlobalTimeWindowController`
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:117:  singleton. Every historical plot subscribes — clicking 1мин / 1ч /
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:118:  6ч / 24ч / Всё on any plot updates every plot. Prediction plots
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:119:  do NOT subscribe; they have their own forward horizon (1/3/6/12/24/48ч).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:120:  `ScientificLogAxisItem` for log-Y tick labels.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:121:- **III.C — Phase-aware AnalyticsView rebuild.** 2×2 QGridLayout swap
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:122:  per experiment phase via `config/analytics_layout.yaml`. Layout per
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:123:  phase: preparation → temperature; vacuum → vacuum prediction +
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:124:  temp/pressure; cooldown → cooldown prediction; measurement → R_thermal
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:125:  + keithley power; warmup / disassembly own mappings. New widget
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:126:  registry at `gui/shell/views/analytics_widgets.py`.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:127:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:128:## Theme switcher (2026-04-18)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:129:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:130:Six bundled YAML theme packs at `config/themes/`: `default_cool`,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:131:`warm_stone`, `anthropic_mono`, `ochre_bloom`, `taupe_quiet`,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:132:`rose_dusk`. Runtime theme loader at `gui/_theme_loader.py` —
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:133:`theme.py` reads tokens from YAML packs. Settings → Тема menu uses
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:134:`os.execv` restart pattern. Status palette (STATUS_OK, WARNING,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:135:CAUTION, FAULT, INFO, STALE, COLD_HIGHLIGHT) locked across all packs.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:136:Phase III.A added `SELECTION_BG` + `FOCUS_RING` to all 12 themes
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:137:including the additional `braun` pack.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:138:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:139:## Governance
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:140:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:141:Architect = Vladimir. Every design-system change goes through
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:142:`docs/design-system/governance/contribution.md`. Every GUI change
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:143:that touches visual rendering must start by reading the relevant
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:144:design-system files. Codex / Gemini reviews check for token leakage
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:145:(hardcoded values), pattern mismatches, and accessibility regressions.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/00 Overview/UI and design system.md:146:

/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:1:---
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:2:source: synthesized from docs/decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation.md, docs/decisions/2026-04-24-d1-d4a-execution.md, ORCHESTRATION.md §7
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:3:adr_id: ADR-002
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:4:date: 2026-04-26 (synthesized; underlying decision 2026-04-24)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:5:status: accepted
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:6:---
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:7:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:8:# ADR-002 — R1 bounded-backoff probe retry
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:9:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:10:## Context
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:11:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:12:Commit `b2b4fb5` (2026-04-23) added a synchronous startup probe to
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:13:`tools/diag_zmq_b1_capture.py`:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:14:`_validate_bridge_startup()` aborts on `bridge.is_alive() == False`
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:15:or first non-OK `safety_status` reply. Useful intent — fail fast on
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:16:subprocess-spawn failure rather than wait 35 s for a misleading
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:17:`zmq.Again`.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:18:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:19:The probe is technically transport-agnostic but is **synchronous
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:20:and single-shot**. Under tcp:// loopback that's adequate — bind +
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:21:connect + first reply is effectively instantaneous. Under
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:22:ipc:// Unix-socket bind, the engine's REP socket may not be ready
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:23:when the probe fires; the diag aborts at cmd #0.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:24:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:25:This is what killed the 2026-04-23 IV.7 test and led to the
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:26:"ipc:// transport doesn't work" misattribution.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:27:[[40 Decisions/2026-04-24-b2b4fb5-investigation|H3 confirmed
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:28:2026-04-24]].
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:29:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:30:## Decision
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:31:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:32:Replace the single-shot probe with a bounded-backoff retry. New
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:33:helper signature in `tools/diag_zmq_b1_capture.py`:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:34:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:35:```python
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:36:_validate_bridge_startup(bridge, attempts=5, backoff_s=0.2,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:37:                         sleep_fn=time.sleep)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:38:```
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:39:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:40:Behavior:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:41:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:42:1. `bridge.is_alive()` single-shot — keeps the
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:43:   subprocess-spawn-failure detection that was the original intent.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:44:2. Loop up to `attempts=5` × `bridge.send_command({"cmd":
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:45:   "safety_status"})`. First OK reply passes.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:46:3. `sleep_fn(backoff_s)` between attempts (bounded; total wait ≤
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:47:   1.0 s for default values).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:48:4. All 5 attempts non-OK → raise
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:49:   `RuntimeError(f"Bridge startup probe failed: {last_reply!r}")` —
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:50:   same error surface as `b2b4fb5` so downstream tooling that
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:51:   greps this marker is unaffected.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:52:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:53:`sleep_fn` injected as a parameter so unit tests can substitute a
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:54:fake without burning real wall-clock.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:55:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:56:Considered and rejected:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:57:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:58:- **R2** — move readiness into `bridge.start()`. Cleaner in
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:59:  principle, but touches more code (new `start()` semantics,
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:60:  test churn). Cost > benefit for a tool-side guard.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:61:- **R3** — revert b2b4fb5 entirely. Loses the spawn-failure catch.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:62:  Cheapest, but the catch is genuinely useful when subprocess fails
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:63:  to start (rare but real on Windows).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:64:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:65:## Consequences
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:66:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:67:- IV.7 ipc:// transport-level testing unblocked.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:68:- Pattern codified for future health probes: synchronous health
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:69:  checks at engine / subprocess startup must accommodate
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:70:  non-instantaneous bind semantics — ipc:// in particular needs a
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:71:  retry-with-backoff. Applies to any future `_validate_*_startup`
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:72:  shape.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:73:- Downstream `B1 capture aborted: ...` greppers are preserved
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:74:  (same error string).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:75:- B1 itself remains OPEN. R1 only repairs the probe; the underlying
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:76:  bug (`30 Investigations/B1 ZMQ idle-death`) is independent.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:77:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:78:## Validation (Q4)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:79:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:80:Post-merge Codex gpt-5.5/high adversarial equivalence review on the
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:81:M2 merge-commit `89b4db1`:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:82:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:83:- Zero findings at any severity. Only `ACCEPTABLE` category used.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:84:- Codex ran inline Python predicate simulation across 7 edge-case
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:85:  inputs (`None`, `{}`, `{"ok": None}`, `{"ok": "True"}`, `{"ok":
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:86:  1}`, `{"ok": True}`, `{"ok": False}`) — R1 and b2b4fb5 predicates
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:87:  behave identically.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:88:- Cross-referenced `ZmqBridge.send_command` +
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:89:  `zmq_subprocess.cmd_forward_loop` to confirm no retry-induced
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:90:  REQ socket state leak (IV.6 ephemeral REQ invariant preserved).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:91:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:92:D1 loop closed. Branch `feat/b2b4fb5-repair` deleted local + remote;
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:93:`c3f4f86` reachable via second-parent of `89b4db1`.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:94:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:95:## Status
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:96:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:97:Accepted. R1 in master. ORCHESTRATION.md §7 ("Hardening + feature
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:98:interaction rule") captures the workflow lesson — this incident is
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:99:the reason that section exists.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/ADR-002 R1 bounded-backoff probe retry.md:100:

/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:9:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:10:## Context
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:11:

/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:13:`docs/ORCHESTRATION.md` (authored 2026-04-23 evening by Vladimir +
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:14:web Claude Opus 4.7). Working tree was non-clean and current branch
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:15:was not master:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:16:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:17:- 3 modified tracked files (`CLAUDE.md`, `.gitignore`, `config/channels.yaml`)
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:18:- 34 untracked files at root
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:19:- Current branch `codex/preserved-local-master-2026-04-21` (6 branch-only swarm-era commits, queued for deletion)

/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:21:  (`.worktrees/codex-safe-merge-b1-truth-recovery` on branch `experiment/iv7-ipc-transport`)

/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:23:  claiming it did
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:24:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:25:CC paused with a 5-blocker STOP report. Architect returned
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:26:Resolutions A–E plus a STOP-discipline amendment and an
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:27:autonomy-expansion (untracked files inside to-be-removed worktrees:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:28:preserve-and-proceed default).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:29:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:30:## Decision

/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:32:Mechanical cleanup applied:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:33:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:34:1. Discard the 6 branch-only commits on `codex/preserved-local-master-2026-04-21`; revert all 3 modified tracked files; switch to master.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:35:2. Commit 1/4 (`adb49fe`) — preserve session detail + ORCHESTRATION.md.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:36:3. Commit 2/4 (`1ea049d`) — archive 11 agent-swarm `.md` files to `docs/audits/2026-04-21-agent-swarm/` and 3 `.py` to `.scratch/zmq-exploration-2026-04-21/`. Keep `CODEX_ARCHITECTURE_CONTROL_PLANE.md` at root and add to §6.2 whitelist.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:37:4. Commit 3/4 (`587bea8`) — `.gitignore` adds 7 patterns (`.worktrees/` first; then `.audit-run/`, `.omc/`, `.swarm/`, `.venv-tools/`, `agentswarm/`, `.scratch/`).
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:38:5. Worktree rename (no commit) — `git worktree move` to fix §5.4 naming mismatch.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:39:6. Stray plan in worktree archived (`cfee680`), then `--force` worktree removal authorized; branch prune of two stale codex/* branches; preserved `codex/safe-merge-b1-truth-recovery` and `experiment/iv7-ipc-transport`.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:40:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:41:Adopted operational rules from this session:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:42:
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:43:- **STOP discipline update.** Plan factual inaccuracies of 1-line
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:44:  magnitude (off-by-one counts, wrong commit messages) → adapt
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:45:  inline, note in ledger, do NOT escalate. Codified in
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:46:  [[_meta/glossary]] and reinforced by `feedback_stop_discipline.md`.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:47:- **Autonomy expansion.** Untracked files inside to-be-removed
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:48:  worktrees: preserve to archive then proceed. Default, not
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:49:  exception.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:50:- **Retroactive semantic versioning** plan for v0.34.0..v0.38.0 —
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:51:  postponed pending B1 mitigation.
/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:52:

/Users/vladimir/Vault/CryoDAQ/40 Decisions/2026-04-23-cleanup-baseline.md:55:Master at `cfee680` (pre-ledger commit). Two preserved branches
